name: T1 Energy Inc.
summary: PART I In February 2025, we changed our corporate name from FREYR Battery, Inc. to T1 Energy Inc. We will not distinguish between our prior and current corporate name and will refer to our current corporate name throughout this Annual Report on Form 10-K. As such, unless expressly indicated or the context requires otherwise, the terms T1, Company, we, us, and our in this document refer to T1 Energy Inc., a Delaware corporation, and, where appropriate, its subsidiaries.
